entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop susceptible to charcoal rot

entities.name: CHARCOAL ROT
entities.description: A root and stalk rot disease of great destructive potential

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: A soilborne, nonaggressive, and plurivorous fungus that causes charcoal rot

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The primary factor that predisposes sorghum to charcoal rot

entities.name: FUNGICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used for the control of charcoal rot

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management techniques used for the control of charcoal rot

entities.name: HOST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the host plant to resist charcoal rot

entities.name: HIGH-YIELDING CULTIVARS
entities.description: Improved cultivars that tend to be very susceptible to charcoal rot
